title: exod daemon: separate principal, UDS/mTLS, per-step verify
deliverable: infra/exec/exod.py — different UNIX user/container; UDS+SO_PEERCRED local, mTLS+SPIFFE-SAN remote; verifies grant sig + per-step snippet digests; reports status under its own identity

acceptance.forged_status_rejected: a step_result not on exod's channel is refused + recorded
